hero.title: Medical management
hero.description: Optimize your practice with digital tools designed especially for healthcare professionals. Appointments, medical records and more, all in one place.

turnosmedicos.title: TurnosMedicos
turnosmedicos.description: The most complete appointment management system for medical offices. Automate your bookings, reduce no-shows and improve your patients' experience.

services.title: Services we offer
services.subtitle: Everything you need to modernize your medical practice

s1.title: Appointment Management
s1.description: Complete scheduling system with automatic confirmations and reminders via WhatsApp and email.

s2.title: Medical Records
s2.description: Secure digital medical records, accessible from any device with complete confidentiality.

s3.title: Billing
s3.description: Invoice and receipt issuance integrated with Argentine health insurance providers.

s4.title: Technical Support
s4.description: Personalized assistance to resolve any questions or technical issues.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No surprises or hidden costs. Choose the plan that best fits your practice.

about.title: About
about.description: We are an Argentine team dedicated to developing technological solutions for the healthcare sector. Our mission is to simplify medical management so that professionals can focus on what they do best: caring for patients.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We're here to help. Write to us and we'll respond as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Technology for healthcare, made in Argentina.
